ucs.title: [LLM] LockBit pre-encryption recovery sabotage chain (bcdedit + vssadmin + wbadmin + wevtutil)
ucs.description: Hunts for the canonical LockBit 2.0/3.0/Black pre-encryption ritual: within minutes, a single host disables Windows Recovery Environment with bcdedit, deletes Volume Shadow Copies via vssadmin/WMIC, purges wbadmin backup catalogs, and clears Security/System event logs with wevtutil. CISA AA23-325A and Mandiant report this exact 4-action sequence as a near-deterministic LockBit affiliate fingerprint immediately before the encryptor fires.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as procs from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.user!="*$" AND ((Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND (Processes.process="*catalog*" OR Processes.process="*backup*" OR Processes.process="*systemstatebackup*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wevtutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*cl*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Remove-WmiObject*Win32_Shadowcopy*" OR Processes.process="*Get-WmiObject*Win32_Shadowcopy*")))) by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=15m
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| eval action=case(match(cmds,"(?i)recoveryenabled\s*No|bootstatuspolicy\s*ignoreallfailures"),"DisableRecovery", match(cmds,"(?i)delete\s+shadows|shadowcopy\s+delete|Win32_Shadowcopy"),"DeleteShadows", match(cmds,"(?i)wbadmin.*delete"),"DeleteBackups", match(cmds,"(?i)wevtutil.*\bcl\b"),"ClearEventLogs")
| stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(action) as actions values(cmds) as cmds dc(action) as distinct_actions by dest user
| where distinct_actions >= 3
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let win = 15m;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend Action = case(
    FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"), "DisableRecovery",
    FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows", "DeleteShadows",
    FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete", "DeleteShadows",
    FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("catalog","backup","systemstatebackup"), "DeleteBackups",
    FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "cl" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("System","Security","Setup","Application"), "ClearEventLogs",
    FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Remove-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-CimInstance Win32_ShadowCopy"), "DeleteShadows",
    "")
| where Action != ""
| summarize Actions = make_set(Action), Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 20), Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10), FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp), EventCount = count()
          by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, win)
| where array_length(Actions) >= 3   // bcdedit + vss + wbadmin/wevtutil — LockBit ritual
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let win = 15m;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User"
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Image = tolower(NewProcessName), Cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
| extend Action = case(
    Image endswith "bcdedit.exe" and (Cmd has "recoveryenabled no" or Cmd has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"), "DisableRecovery",
    Image endswith "vssadmin.exe" and Cmd has "delete" and Cmd has "shadows", "DeleteShadows",
    Image endswith "wmic.exe" and Cmd has "shadowcopy" and Cmd has "delete", "DeleteShadows",
    Image endswith "wbadmin.exe" and Cmd has "delete" and (Cmd has "catalog" or Cmd has "backup" or Cmd has "systemstatebackup"), "DeleteBackups",
    Image endswith "wevtutil.exe" and Cmd has " cl " and (Cmd has "system" or Cmd has "security" or Cmd has "application" or Cmd has "setup"), "ClearEventLogs",
    (Image endswith "powershell.exe" or Image endswith "pwsh.exe") and (Cmd has "remove-wmiobject win32_shadowcopy" or Cmd has "get-wmiobject win32_shadowcopy" or Cmd has "get-ciminstance win32_shadowcopy"), "DeleteShadows",
    "")
| where Action != ""
| summarize Actions = make_set(Action), Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 20), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), EventCount = count()
          by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, win)
| where array_length(Actions) >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Individually any one of these tools fires from legitimate admin/backup workflows (low-fidelity). What makes this LockBit-specific is the *combination* observed in CISA AA23-325A and Mandiant LockBit 3.0 reverse-engineering: the encryptor invokes all four destructive actions sequentially within seconds via embedded API calls before file encryption begins. Requiring ≥3 distinct destructive actions o

ucs.title: [LLM] LockBit self-propagation: SYSTEM-context fanout of identical binary via services.exe across multiple hosts
ucs.description: Hunts for LockBit 3.0/Black/5.0's hard-coded self-spread routine: the encryptor authenticates to ADMIN$ over SMB using credentials from a kerberoasted/dumped account, drops itself with a randomised name into C:\Windows or C:\ProgramData on every reachable host, then registers and starts a Windows service so services.exe spawns the binary as SYSTEM. Detection correlates the same SHA256 executing under services.exe→SYSTEM across ≥5 distinct devices within 30 minutes — a behaviour signature of LockBit's SMB+SCM fanout (also used by BadRabbit, NotPetya derivatives, but rarely by legitimate ops).
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.process_path) as path values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="services.exe" AND Processes.user IN ("*SYSTEM*","NT AUTHORITY\\SYSTEM") AND (Processes.process_path="*\\Windows\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Processes.process_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*") AND Processes.process_name!="svchost.exe" AND Processes.process_name!="MsMpEng.exe" AND Processes.process_name!="TrustedInstaller.exe" AND Processes.process_name!="MpCmdRun.exe" by Processes.process_hash Processes.process_name Processes.dest _time span=30m
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| stats min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime dc(dest) as host_count values(dest) as hosts values(cmd) as cmds values(path) as paths by process_hash process_name
| where host_count >= 5 AND (lastTime - firstTime) <= 1800
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let ShortWindow = 30m;
let HostThreshold = 5;
let KnownGoodNames = dynamic(["svchost.exe","msmpeng.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","mpcmdrun.exe","smartscreen.exe","sense.exe","sppsvc.exe","securityhealthservice.exe","wermgr.exe","perfhost.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "services.exe"
| where AccountName =~ "system"
| where FileName !in~ (KnownGoodNames)
| where FolderPath has_any (@"\Windows\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\Windows\Temp\")
| where not(FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\System32\" or FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\SysWOW64\" or FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\WinSxS\" or FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\" or FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\servicing\")
| where isnotempty(SHA256)
| summarize HostCount = dcount(DeviceId),
            Hosts = make_set(DeviceName, 50),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            SampleCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine),
            SamplePath = any(FolderPath),
            ParentCmds = make_set(InitiatingProcessCommandLine, 5)
          by SHA256, FileName, bin(Timestamp, ShortWindow)
| where HostCount >= HostThreshold
| where datetime_diff('minute', LastSeen, FirstSeen) <= 30
| join kind=leftanti (
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp between (ago(30d) .. ago(1d))
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "services.exe"
    | summarize by SHA256
  ) on SHA256
| order by HostCount desc, FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let ShortWindow = 30m;
let HostThreshold = 5;
let KnownGoodNames = dynamic(["svchost.exe","msmpeng.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","mpcmdrun.exe","smartscreen.exe","sense.exe","sppsvc.exe","securityhealthservice.exe","wermgr.exe","perfhost.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where ParentProcessName endswith "\\services.exe"
| where SubjectUserSid == "S-1-5-18"   // SYSTEM
| extend ImageLower = tolower(NewProcessName)
| extend ImageName = tostring(split(ImageLower, "\\")[array_length(split(ImageLower, "\\")) - 1])
| where ImageName !in (KnownGoodNames)
| where ImageLower has_any ("\\windows\\", "\\programdata\\", "\\perflogs\\", "\\users\\public\\", "\\windows\\temp\\")
| where not(ImageLower startswith "c:\\windows\\system32\\" or ImageLower startswith "c:\\windows\\syswow64\\" or ImageLower startswith "c:\\windows\\winsxs\\" or ImageLower startswith "c:\\windows\\microsoft.net\\" or ImageLower startswith "c:\\windows\\servicing\\")
| extend FileHashClean = tostring(split(FileHash, "=")[-1])
| where isnotempty(FileHashClean)
| summarize HostCount = dcount(Computer),
            Hosts = make_set(Computer, 50),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            SampleCmd = any(CommandLine),
            SamplePath = any(NewProcessName)
          by FileHashClean, ImageName, bin(TimeGenerated, ShortWindow)
| where HostCount >= HostThreshold
| where datetime_diff('minute', LastSeen, FirstSeen) <= 30
| order by HostCount desc, FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Generic 'service execution' or 'unsigned binary in C:\Windows' detections are noisy because legitimate installers, MSI patches, and TrustedInstaller routinely match. The LockBit-specific tell is the *fanout*: an identical SHA256 launching under services.exe→SYSTEM from a non-System32 path on ≥5 hosts in <30 minutes is a behaviour shape uniquely produced by ransomware self-spread (LockBit 3.0/Black
